steps.title: Isolate x terms
steps.content:
First, add x to both sides of the equation to get all x-terms on one side.
$$13x = 112 - x\quad \Rightarrow \quad14x = 112$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Now, divide both sides by 14 to solve for x.
$$14x = 112\quad \Rightarrow \quad x = \frac{112}{14} = 8$$That matches choice B — B is correct.
